sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114466" key="xoropoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορο-ποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114466.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">institution, arrangement of a chorus,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.106</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
